mapper.sql: rh.re_id as rr_id, rh.hobby, rh.level_myself, rh.level_mechanism, rh.remarks, rh.attribute1, rh.attribute2, rh.attribute3, rh.enabled_flag, rh.id, rh.update_time, rh.create_time, rh.update_by, rh.create_by

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rr_id, ${tAlias}.hobby as ${tAlias}_hobby, ${tAlias}.level_myself as ${tAlias}_level_myself, ${tAlias}.level_mechanism as ${tAlias}_level_mechanism, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by
mapper.insert: insert into re_hobby (re_id, hobby, level_myself, level_mechanism, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, update_time, create_time, update_by, create_by) values (#{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{hobby,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{levelMyself,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{levelMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update re_hobby set re_id = #{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, hobby = #{hobby,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level_myself = #{levelMyself,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level_mechanism = #{levelMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
